author: Post-Math
description: Survey wide content instead of scrolling sideways. Pan and zoom Mermaid diagrams (wheel, Ctrl+wheel, or buttons), fit them to the frame, and open diagrams or wide tables full-screen. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.name: Lookout 1.1.2

releases.author: jphan32
releases.description:
First public release.

**Mermaid diagrams** — pan (drag/wheel), zoom (Ctrl/Cmd+wheel or buttons), 100% gauge, fit-to-frame, and full-screen.
**Tables** — a full-screen button for wide tables, in both Reading view and Live Preview.

### Install (manual)
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/lookout/`, then enable **Lookout** under Community plugins.
releases.name: Lookout 1.1.1
